reviews.comment:
Lugar muy concurrido, hay demoras habitualmente aqui, y la atencion es variable, pero si no sos socio serviclub, no se ofrecen ni a limpiarte el parabrisas...

(Translated by Google)
Very busy place, there are usually delays here, and the service is inconsistent, but if you're not a Serviclub member, they won't even offer to clean your windshield...
